title: centaurea foveolata
intro: Centaurea foveolata, also known as the rock thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea foveolata include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Centaurea foveolata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
